message:
Add hide-finished-agents toggle to sidebar agent tree

- Add countFinished utility to count completed/failed agents (excluding root)
- Add filterRunning utility to shallow-copy tree with only running agents
- Add showFinished toggle state with conditional filtering in AgentTree component
- Show toggle button below tree only when root is running and finished agents exist
- When session is complete (root not running), always show all agents
- Add finishedToggle CSS with dashed border style matching existing conventions
- Update existing tests to account for default-hidden finished agents
- Add 6 new tests for hide-finished toggle behavior
